hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs integrate FCA-specific rules, Travel Rule operations, and KYC orchestration into a unified compliance layer with audit-ready evidence and regulatory change monitoring.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: FCA compliance slows without connected workflows
problem_description: Crypto compliance teams struggle with fragmented provider outputs and incomplete audit trails when managing FCA regulatory requirements. This leads to slow onboarding, inconsistent risk reviews, and difficulties preparing defensible evidence for audits and regulatory reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs, regulatory rule updates and case management into one workflow enabling VASPs to streamline FCA compliance with consistent risk reviews and audit-ready evidence.
workflow_title: From regulatory updates to internal rules
workflow_description: SFTY monitors FCA regulatory changes and maps them to internal policies enabling timely rule updates, operational alignment, case creation and audit evidence preservation.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One FCA compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects diverse provider outputs into structured FCA-specific workflows, cases, decisions, evidence and reports for clear, auditable jurisdictional compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing FCA requirements with structured provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and scalable deployment for controlled compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support FCA compliance workflows for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how FCA-specific policies update compliance rules
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how provider outputs form audit-ready FCA evidence

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for FCA crypto compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects FCA-specific rules, regulatory updates, Travel Rule, onboarding, case management and reporting into structured workflows for VASPs and digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support FCA onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY organizes FCA onboarding by connecting jurisdictional KYC and KYB checks, applying internal policies, routing reviews, preserving evidence and supporting audit-ready decision history across customer and counterparty profiles.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve FCA audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit evidence by recording case history, decision logs, provider outputs and compliance actions, creating a traceable, reviewable record aligned with FCA regulatory expectations and audit readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing FCA compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, integrating fragmented outputs into one connected FCA compliance workflow layer without disrupting current toolchains.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs, adding structured workflows, case management and regulatory rule updates for FCA-specific compliance.
final_title: Structure FCA workflows into controlled compliance cases
final_description: Review how SFTY connects FCA-specific rules, provider outputs and Travel Rule operations into audit-ready, multi-jurisdiction compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
